finding_results.notes: Replaced explicit meta-process phrasing with observable stress behavior: Marisol begins with over-specific temporal/sensory detail, then abruptly cuts to the core disclosure.

Converted repeated impact-metaphor loci into concrete in-room consequences (table/fork movement, gesture toward folder, audible reaction in hallway), removing the landing/dropping template at the flagged beats.

summary: Applied a line-level prose/copyedit pass focused on packet findings: removed process-leak stress narration and replaced repeated impact-metaphor beats with physical scene action while preserving chapter continuity, character voice, and pressure.
